subject: Limited Time to get 50% off a Times Subscription at our Labor Day Sale.
body:
The New York Times Labor Day Sale

------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBUAE8uB81HXJB87-54AAwENchH/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D49K6L%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Fall Elections, Fashion, Sports and More.

LABOR DAY SALE

SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS ON
A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

ENDS SEPTEMBER 3

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBUAE8uB81HXJB87-54AAwENchH/sub01t

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Labor Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of 
big subscription savings. Save on fall fashion coverage and 
everything else The Times has to offer with 50% off for a 
full 26 weeks on a Times subscription. 

Choose whichever option works best for you: 

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access 
to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and 
innovative multimedia, from the world's finest journalists, 
on NYTimes.com and NYTimes smartphone and tablet apps. 

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print 
edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your 
subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and 
NYTimes apps for your smartphone and tablet. Plus get a 
free additional log in so a friend or family member can 
also enjoy digital access. 

Don't miss this opportunity to enjoy exceptional savings on 
your choice of Times subscriptions. 

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS SEPTEMBER 3!* 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBUAE8uB81HXJB87-54AAwENchH/sub02t

-----------------------------------------------------------------

All subscriptions include:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBUAE8uB81HXJB87-54AAwENchH/sub03t

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com. 

*This sale expires on September 4, 2014, 9 a.m. ET. 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not 
include Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital 
versions of The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery 
promotional offer valid for new subscribers in areas served 
by The New York Times Delivery Service. 
Other restrictions apply. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBUAE8uB81HXJB87-54AAwENchH/nyt

body_html:
The New York Times Labor Day Sale

View in browser
Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Labor Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of big subscription savings. Save on our expansive election reporting and everything else The Times has to offer with 50% off for a full 26 weeks on a Times subscription.

Choose whichever option works best for you:

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia, from the world’s finest journalists, on NYTimes.com and NYTimes smartphone and tablet apps.

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and NYTimes apps for your smartphone and tablet. Plus get a free additional log in so a friend or family member can also enjoy digital access.

Don’t miss this opportunity to enjoy exceptional savings on your choice of Times subscriptions.

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS SEPTEMBER 3!*

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com.

*This sale expires on September 4, 2014, 9 a.m. ET.

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital versions of The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery promotional offer valid for new subscribers in areas served by The New York Times Delivery Service. Other restrictions apply.

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
